titleStmt.title: SII 29.22: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 22. (A.R. No. 27 of 1961-62.) JAṬAPRŌLE, KOLLAPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On another pillar lying in front of the Vēṇugōpālaswāmy temple.
Bottom portion of the pillar is broken and lost resulting in loss of a few lines of writing on all the three faces where the record is engraved.

The record registers a land grant to Lakuḷēśvara-bhaṭṭāraka of Rāmatīrtha made probably by the king Jagadēkamalla while he was camping at Sindaya-taḍi in Taṟekāḍu-nāḍu. Mentions Ettapi in Vaḍḍavaṇa-500.
The date portion is partially lost and only (Phā)lguṇa, śu. 10, Wednesday can be made out. It is in characters of the 11th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuva
nāśraya śrī pṛthvīva
llabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmajjagadē
kamalladēvara vija
yarājya muttarōtta
rābhivṛddhi pravardha(mā)

lguṇa suddha(dda) 10 bu
dhavāradaṁdutta
ṟekāḍu nāḍoḷaga
ṇa sindaya taḍiya
nelevīḍinoḷe rāma
tīrtthāda lakuḷīśva
ra bhaṭṭārakarge vaḍḍa
vaṇadaynūṟa
ṟoḷagaṇa Ettapi
taḻa baḷiya

bahubhirvvasu
dhā dattā rājabhi
sagarādibhiḥ ya
sya yasya yadā
bhūmi tasya ta
sya tadā phaḷaṁ
svadattaṁ parada
ttaṁ vāyō harē
ta vasuṁdharā ṣa
Digital edition of SII 29.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
